caption: The video captures a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, dated April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. The scene is set in a conference room where several individuals, dressed in business attire, are seated around a table. A man in a suit appears to be addressing the committee, gesturing with his hand as he speaks. Behind him, other members of the committee listen attentively, some taking notes or looking at their laptops. The atmosphere suggests a serious discussion, with participants engaged in the proceedings. The setting includes various office items like water bottles, a coffee maker, and documents, indicating a professional environment.
